GOLD|2026-07-16.macro_summary: US Core Retail Sales m/m, Retail Sales m/m, Philly Fed Manufacturing Index, and Unemployment Claims at 18:00 IST today will HELP the GOLD LONG if they are weaker than expected, and HURT it if they are stronger. President Trump speaking at 06:30 IST on Friday will HELP the GOLD LONG if his comments are perceived as dovish, and HURT it if they are hawkish.

USDCHF|2026-07-16.macro_summary: US Retail Sales m/m and Unemployment Claims at 18:00 IST are key; stronger than expected data helps USDCHF long, weaker data hurts. The Philly Fed Manufacturing Index at 18:00 IST also matters; a higher reading supports the trade, a lower reading opposes it. President Trump speaking at 06:30 IST on Friday could impact USDCHF; positive remarks would help, negative remarks would hurt.
